axis: data pipeline (batch ETL, no end-user accounts)

mustHaves.summary: Scheduled ingest + per-row schema validation of source CSVs
Load validated rows; record rejects with reasons

notes: No end-user accounts -> authn/authz excluded. secrets REQUIRED: warehouse + source-bucket credentials (external-integrations also forces secrets). external-integrations required: the source bucket + partner feeds are named third-party dependencies. data-lifecycle required: ingested data retention + rejects + idempotency (T8) is core to the product. observability required: §8 describes a scheduled production job whose operator reads run logs. perf-envelope excluded: §8 names correctness, not a throughput/latency number. abuse-surface excluded: no public/unauthenticated network surface.
